Action Input.content: // Implementations for calculateDensity, calculateMass, and calculateVolume with exceptions and enum usage.
public enum Material {IRON(7.8), COPPER(8.9), ALUMINUM(2.7); private final double density; Material(double density) { this.density = density; } public double getDensity() { return density; }}

import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test; import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.*; public class PhysicsCalculatorTest { @Test void testCalculateDensity() { PhysicsCalculator calc = new PhysicsCalculator(); double density = calc.calculateDensity(10, 20); assertEquals(0.5, density); } // Add more tests for calculateMass and calculateVolume with assertThrows for invalid inputs.
